_comment: EXAMPLE: business-struct decoding on top of the standard Vector FEE V3 layout. Decodes SafeSection reset context (FS_SafeSection_Types.h + FS_SafeSection_Prv.h + FS_Reset_Types.h) and DEM primary entries (Dem_Lcfg.h). The engine parses the C headers into a struct+enum catalog; the inline `structCatalog` only PATCHES fields with rich `format`s + the union discriminator + gap-fill enums not scrapeable from the headers. Block->struct binding is the engine's decision via `blockStructs`. NOTE: `match.fileNameIncludes` + the struct source names are project-specific — copy this next to a matching dump and adjust. Requires `nvmCfg` (NvM_Cfg.c) so structs decode only the business data, never the CMAC.
vendor: Vector MICROSAR FEE V3 (struct decode example)

structs._comment: C headers parsed together (order matters: Prv defines sizes used by Types). ARXML sources would be listed here too and parsed via arxmlStructs.

enumsFromDefines._comment: Scrape the AUTOSAR DEM event-id table (#define DemConf_DemEventParameter_<NAME> <id>u) from Dem_Lcfg.h into the DemEventName enum, so a decoded EventId shows its symbolic name. Vendor-blind: the plugin only knows '#define <prefix><NAME> <int>'; the prefix is config.

structCatalog._comment: Overlay: patches parsed structs by field name (adds `format`, union discriminator/cases) and adds gap-fill enums. Field byte layout still comes from the C headers.

FS_InfoBlockBuildType.name: FS_InfoBlockBuildType
FS_InfoBlockBuildType._comment: SW-version trailing build-type byte (not in FS_Reset_Types.h).

DemUdsStatus.name: DemUdsStatus
DemUdsStatus._comment: UDS DEM status-byte bit labels (bit index -> label), used with format.kind=bitflags. Not present in Dem_Lcfg.h.

values.4: Test not completed since last clear
values.6: Test not completed this oper. cycle
